features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Allow users to create accounts, log in, and manage their profiles.
features.interactivity: Users can sign up using email or social media accounts.
features.edge_cases: Handle forgotten passwords with a reset link and account verification.
features.polish: Provide feedback on successful login/logout with animations.

features.name: Product Catalog
features.description: Display a grid of vegetables with images, prices, and descriptions.
features.interactivity: Users can filter products by category (e.g., leafy greens, root vegetables) and sort by price or popularity.
features.edge_cases: Show a 'no products found' message if filters yield no results.
features.polish: Implement lazy loading for images and a loading spinner while fetching data.

features.name: Product Detail Page
features.description: Provide detailed information about each vegetable, including nutritional facts and recipes.
features.interactivity: Users can add products to their cart directly from this page.
features.edge_cases: Handle out-of-stock items gracefully with a 'Notify Me' button.
features.polish: Include a loading animation while fetching product details and a smooth transition back to the catalog.

features.name: Shopping Cart
features.description: Allow users to view and manage items they intend to purchase.
features.interactivity: Users can adjust quantities, remove items, and view total costs.
features.edge_cases: Handle scenarios where items in the cart go out of stock before checkout.
features.polish: Display a clear empty state message when the cart is empty and a confirmation message when items are added/removed.

features.name: Checkout Process
features.description: Facilitate a smooth checkout experience with multiple payment options.
features.interactivity: Users can enter shipping information, select delivery options, and apply discount codes.
features.edge_cases: Handle payment failures with clear error messages and options to retry.
features.polish: Show a loading indicator during payment processing and a success message after completion.

features.name: Order History
features.description: Allow users to view their past orders and track current orders.
features.interactivity: Users can click on past orders to view details and reorder items.
features.edge_cases: Handle cases where there are no past orders with a friendly message encouraging users to shop.
features.polish: Implement smooth transitions when navigating between order details and the main order history page.

features.name: Search Functionality
features.description: Enable users to search for specific vegetables or products.
features.interactivity: Users can type in a search bar, and suggestions will appear as they type.
features.edge_cases: Show a 'no results found' message if the search yields no products.
features.polish: Include a loading spinner while fetching search results and highlight matching terms in the results.

features.name: User Reviews and Ratings
features.description: Allow users to leave reviews and ratings for products.
features.interactivity: Users can rate products and write comments, which can be displayed on the product detail page.
features.edge_cases: Handle inappropriate content with moderation tools and provide users with feedback on their review submission.
features.polish: Show a loading spinner while submitting reviews and a success message upon completion.

features.name: Responsive Design
features.description: Ensure the website is fully responsive and optimized for mobile devices.
features.interactivity: Users can navigate seamlessly across devices without losing functionality.
features.edge_cases: Test for different screen sizes and orientations to ensure usability.
features.polish: Implement smooth animations and transitions to enhance the mobile experience.

features.name: Newsletter Subscription
features.description: Allow users to subscribe to a newsletter for updates and promotions.
features.interactivity: Users can enter their email to subscribe and receive confirmation.
features.edge_cases: Handle duplicate subscriptions and provide an option to unsubscribe.
features.polish: Show a success message after subscription and a loading indicator while processing.
